title: Bridge Essay: Monitoring the neural activity associated with praying in Sahaja Yoga meditation

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Monitoring the neural activity associated with praying in Sahaja Yoga meditation.**. BMC Neurosci.. PMID: 37957605. DOI: 10.1186/s12868-023-00828-x. BACKGROUND: Sahaja Yoga Meditation draws on many religious traditions and uses avariety of techniques including Christian prayer to reach astate known as thoughtless awareness, or mental silence. While there are many studies on the neural correlates of meditation, few studies have focused on the neural correlates of praying.
